patches.name: menufix
patches.desc: Enable the four lobby menu buttons (NewChar/Lottery/Delete/Session) that scene 0x16 (FUN_0051a370) hardcodes disabled via the enable array [1,0,0,0,0,1,0,1]. Same-length imm8 00->01 at the four `mov byte [esp+disp],0` sites. Verified live (Task 1): clicking advances the new-character flow.
patches.verified: live (clickable)

patches.name: dlgfix
patches.desc: Repoint the two generic-dialog confirm-button labels in FUN_0056ebf0 away from constmsg group 103 (login-error strings '로그인에 실패했습니다.'/'버전이 다릅니다.') to group 98 ('결정'/'취소'). Same-length imm8 0x67->0x62. Index pushes already match. No constmsg/data change.
patches.verified: applied; not yet live-verified

patches.name: earlygrid-ringclear
patches.desc: Let a real non-empty 0x0315 strategic cell-grid response advance the world-init walk. The original client leaves the pending-send ring non-empty after the 0x0315 parser, so LOGH_STRAT_GRID_EARLY stalls before 0x0f02. This same-length patch clears only the 0x0315 ring counter after staging copy and before RLE decode, allowing the real 0x0313/0x0315 galaxy grid to reach staging before FUN_004c5350 snapshots it into live tables.
patches.verified: live marker-fix evidence: real early grid reaches 81 live markers without the 0x0314 stall

sites.note: FUN_004ba2b0 case 0x0315: force clientBase+0x357ec0=0 after 5004B staging copy and before FUN_004abbb0, preserving decode/tail flow; enables LOGH_STRAT_GRID_EARLY without the pending-ring stall.

patches.name: strat-camera-focus
patches.desc: P0-02 SURGICAL code-cave (M1-1, T07). Detour FUN_004c4170 prologue into the interior 0xCC int3 cave at VA 0x5d5290; when *(source+0x320)==0 (source=*(mainState+8)) write the player home cell so the strategic current cell *(DAT_007cd04c+0x11178) populates -> FUN_004d6310 passes (0x0b01 enabled) AND the camera centers on the home cell (Front 3). cell source=0xa1c (2588 = row25*100+col88 = 제국 수도 ヴァルハラ/オーディン page-101 canon dot; matches server FACTION_CAPITAL.empire + LOGH_PLAYER_FOCUS_CELL seed). 2026-06-21 정정: 이전 0x9f6(2550=중립역 50,25)은 재추출 전 stale 셀이었다.
patches.verified: ENCODED + byte-verified against G7MTClient.playable.exe: prologue A0 54 A5 7C 00 @fileoff 0x0c4170; interior 0xCC int3 cave @VA 0x5d5290 (fileoff 0x1d5290), measured 48 B, 0 inbound refs. cave body 38 B (fits 48). Cell source: 0xa1c (2588 = empire capital ヴァルハラ canon). Frida positive-control PROVEN the same source+0x320 write closes the chain (validator->pass, camera centers). NOT yet end-to-end live-confirmed with the STATIC detour — needsLive: apply for one ui_explorer run, drive to world, click home cell, observe 0x0b01 + camera center.

sites.note: cave body (interior int3 pad): if src320==0 set home cell, then displaced mov al, jmp 0x4c4175

patches.name: hud-msgdat-groupfix
patches.desc: Repoint FUN_0058d140/FUN_0058ee70 HUD/detail MsgDat label lookups from constmsg group 0x68 (fire-mode labels, size 3) to group 0x63 (status/date labels, size 27). This removes source-proven NO DATA labels without adding speculative server records.
patches.verified: MsgDat lookup trace g006-msgdat-lookup-no1202-20260621.json showed group 0x68 subIds 0x03..0x1a returning NO DATA; original CAB and KO constmsg both have group 0x68 size 3 and group 0x63 has the consumed labels.

patches.name: hud-character-status-msgdatfix
patches.desc: Repoint FUN_0058d140 lower-left HUD stat label away from constmsg group 0x67/sub7 (login/account error) to the Japanese-reference stat label group 0x62/sub5 (体力/체력).
patches.verified: Reference screenshot .omo/reference/toshichan.my.coocan.jp/ddcc72_status.jpg shows the lower-left character HUD first row as 体力, PCP, MCP, 航続, not キャラクターステータス. MsgDat layout confirms constmsg record 2995 = 体力, group 0x62 sub5; record 2968 = キャラクターステータス, group 0x60 sub7, belongs to a different character-status screen title. RE site FUN_0058d140 originally hardcodes push 7; push 0x67 before writing the HUD label, which made the Korean client show the account-error string 이미 탈퇴하셨습니다.

sites.note: FUN_0058d140 lower-left HUD stat label subId: 7 -> 5 (constmsg group 0x62 sub5 = 体力/체력)
FUN_0058d140 lower-left HUD stat label group: 0x67 login/account errors -> 0x62 stat labels

patches.name: mission-msgdat-subidfix
patches.desc: Fix FUN_0054f680 mission-selection UI lookups that request constmsg group 0x6a with enum-biased subIds 0x09..0x15. Group 0x6a is source-backed as six mission labels only, so the UI must render subIds 0..5 and only build six rows.
patches.verified: RE: FUN_0054f680 fills DAT_02221e14 for the mission selector, FUN_00550a00 consumes that local text array for two selected mission labels, and FUN_004afd90 bounds mission selection to values <7. MsgDat source: original JP constmsg group 0x6a has 防衛任務/占領任務/迎撃任務/偵察任務/遊撃任務/撤退任務 and KO overlay has 방위 임무/점령 임무/요격 임무/정찰 임무/유격 임무/철퇴 임무. Live trace g006-msgdat-lookup-final-v2 showed the invalid 0x6a subIds 0x09..0x15 as the visible left mission-list NO DATA path.

sites.note: FUN_0054f680 mission row fill: use subId i, not i+9
FUN_0054f680 mission row fill: stop after six source-backed labels
FUN_0054f680 first mission list: add six rows only
FUN_0054f680 first mission selector initial label -> group 0x6a subId 0
FUN_0054f680 second mission list: add six rows only
FUN_0054f680 second mission selector initial label -> group 0x6a subId 0

patches.name: sector-label-hardcoded-ko
patches.desc: Replace the remaining CP932 hardcoded strategic sector labels that are concatenated with Korean system names in the GDI text path. This fixes mixed CP949+CP932 mojibake such as 발할라星系 / 星系内宇宙 without adding any server records.
patches.verified: GDI trace g006-gdi-text-missionfix-20260621.json showed CP949 system name bytes followed by CP932 90af8c6e / 90af8c6e93e089469288 through the ExtTextOutA/W path; binary scan found the CP932 literals only at EXE file offsets 0x38d4c8 and 0x38d4ac.

sites.note: CP932 星系内宇宙 -> CP949 성계내우주 (same 10-byte length)

patches.name: session-select-hardcoded-ko
patches.desc: Localize the hardcoded UTF-16LE session-selection header/card labels in the EXE .data table. These strings are not MsgDat and are not covered by the .rsrc patcher.
patches.verified: ENCODED 2026-06-29: live session-hangeulmenu-2d96-20260629 proved the session picker still rendered Japanese even after koreanMenuMode WriteProfileStringW succeeded and MsgDat constmsg IDs were Korean. Raw-byte scan found the visible labels in .data at file offsets 0x38d910..0x38d9b8 and related command label at 0x38c790. All replacements are UTF-16LE same-length.

patches.name: galaxy-screen-grid-format-msgdat-boundaryfix
patches.verified: ENCODED 2026-06-21: FUN_0053f2d0 builds a 3-row text list and calls FUN_00522010 as g0x16/s0x77, g0x16/s0x7b, g0x16/s0x78. g0x16 ends at sub0x7a, so only the middle row crosses the constmsg group boundary. Its original flat index is 1399, which is group 0x17/sub0 (플라스마 폭풍 그리드). Same-length branch/local immediate rewiring only; no speculative records are added.

patches.name: hud-hardcoded-stat-labels-ko
patches.verified: GDI trace g013-gdi-after-login.json showed bytes 8d7191b1 rendered as CP949 mojibake 뛮뫏 in the character stat area. CP932 decodes it as 航続, and binary scan found the literal only once in G7MTClient.exe at file offset 0x38d59c / VA 0x0078d59c.

sites.note: CP932 航続 -> CP949 항속 (same 4-byte length)

patches.name: font-face
patches.desc: Replace the primary GDI UI font face string 'MS UI Gothic' (VA 0x0077402c) with 'Pretendard'. RE: FUN_004ea180 calls FUN_004aec10(s_MS_UI_Gothic_0077402c,...) for the UI CFont cache used by FUN_004aec70. The D3D texture-glyph atlas has a separate face slot at DAT_0076e240 handled by font-atlas-face.json. Both CreateFontA sites already pass HANGEUL_CHARSET (0x81, encoded as `push -0x7f`); text quality is handled by the separate default-stack `font-cleartype` patch. Same-length 16-byte in-place region replace (face <=15 chars + NUL, bounded by the following 'mkCreateVertexBuffer'); NO code cave. RE/docs: docs/logh7-font-remaster.md.
patches.verified: ENCODED + originalHex guarded for vanilla references; current playable/installed trees may already contain the patched face. Same-length region patch (no cave). Requires 'Pretendard' present on the host; for the shipped Pretendard face, launcher/ui_explorer must register the bundled fonts before client start.

sites.note: global GDI font face 'MS UI Gothic' -> 'Pretendard' (16-byte slot, NUL-padded)

patches.name: font-atlas-face
patches.desc: Patch the separate D3D texture-glyph atlas face slot used by FUN_004b07c0/FUN_004b0960 from CP949 Gulim (DAT_0076e240) to Pretendard. Raw-byte proof: FUN_004b07c0 contains `bf 40 e2 76 00` (mov edi,0x0076e240) and copies that 16-byte string into the atlas object at +8; FUN_004b0960 then passes +8 to CreateFontA. This is not the global GDI face slot at 0x0077402c, so both slots must be patched for a true all-Pretendard client.
patches.verified: ENCODED + raw bytes verified against G7MTClient.korean.exe: file 0x0036e240 is b1bcb8b2000000000000000000000000. Same-length 16-byte data patch, no code cave. GDI spawn probe 2026-06-27 previously proved this path created faceHex=b1bcb8b200 while the other GDI path created Pretendard.

sites.note: D3D glyph-atlas face DAT_0076e240: CP949 Gulim -> Pretendard (16-byte slot)

patches.name: font-cleartype
patches.desc: Upgrade the two LOGH VII CreateFontA call sites from ANTIALIASED_QUALITY (4) to CLEARTYPE_QUALITY (5). This pairs with font-face.json for the primary UI cache and font-atlas-face.json for the D3D texture-glyph atlas, so both CreateFontA paths use Pretendard before quality is raised. RE: FUN_004aec70 and FUN_004b0960 both pass quality via `push 4`; GDI probes confirmed HANGEUL_CHARSET face resolution is runtime-dependent and must be verified live.
patches.verified: ENCODED (two 2-byte same-length immediate patches). originalHex byte-verified against the current canonical playable/client EXE before writing. Needs live visual confirmation in the real client after rebuilding/deploying.

patches.name: font-atlas-antialias
patches.desc: Keep the primary UI CreateFontA path on CLEARTYPE_QUALITY, but restore the D3D glyph-atlas CreateFontA path to ANTIALIASED_QUALITY. RE: FUN_004b0960 renders dynamic glyphs into a 16bpp DIB, then the client extracts alpha from the high nibble of the first byte (`byte >> 4`). Live/user-visible symptoms and the GDI raster comparison show Pretendard 14px with ClearType produces mostly partial-alpha outline pixels in that atlas path. Applying this after font-cleartype changes only the atlas quality push 5 -> 4; face remains Pretendard and charset remains HANGEUL_CHARSET.
patches.verified: Raw original bytes were verified against the previous canonical playable 98ca at file 0x000b0b91 = 6a05. Promoted to the default stack after live runtime-patch verification on the real game EXE showed the atlas-antialias path removed the hollow/outline glyph symptom while preserving the Pretendard face. Current canonical 79142d12 carries the patched byte 6a04 in the default stack.

sites.note: FUN_004b0960 D3D glyph-atlas CreateFontA quality: CLEARTYPE_QUALITY(5) -> ANTIALIASED_QUALITY(4), applied after font-cleartype.

patches.name: font-readable-size
patches.desc: Increase the two LOGH VII UI font size sources after the Pretendard face patches. Primary GDI UI cache: FUN_004ea180 passes size 0x0c to FUN_004aec10, later consumed by FUN_004aec70 -> CreateFontA(-MulDiv(size,dpi,72)). Patch 12 -> 16. D3D texture-glyph atlas: FUN_004b07c0 computes uVar4=(LOGPIXELSY*10)/72 & 0xfffe, which is 12 at 96 DPI, stores it at atlas+0x60/+0x64, and derives the glyph cell from it. Patch the 5-byte even-mask to add 3 instead, yielding 16 at 96 DPI while keeping the existing atlas cell rounding path. Same-length immediate/code replacement only; needs live screenshot verification for clipping in compact edit boxes and buttons.
patches.verified: Raw bytes verified against G7MTClient.korean.exe, vanilla ghidra reference, and canonical playable references: primary site file 0x000ea1c6 = 6a0c; atlas site file 0x000b0869 = 25feff0000. Same-length immediate/code replacement only. The 16px-ish bytes were previously built as a candidate; now promoted after user-visible 14px-ish text remained too small.

sites.note: FUN_004ea180 -> FUN_004aec10 primary GDI UI font size: 12 -> 16.
FUN_004b07c0 atlas size result: replace `and eax,0xfffe` with `add eax,3; nop; nop`, so 96DPI atlas height becomes 16 instead of 12 and the existing cell rounding path remains intact.

patches.name: login-title-ko
patches.desc: Load the official Korean login/title texture instead of the Japanese title texture while preserving the original logo artwork. FUN_0051cda0's initial scene resolves the hardcoded asset string /../data/image/gamemenu/title_japan.tga; the deploy/package steps restore title_korea.tga from title_korea.original.tga so generated glyph overlays are not shipped.
patches.verified: RE string xref: logh7_redex str title reports VA 0x00786998 /../data/image/gamemenu/title_japan.tga. Same-length ASCII asset path patch; live visual confirmation required after build.

patches.name: login-blank-password-local-ok
patches.desc: Allow the remastered login scene to submit while the native-resolution input hitboxes are still misrouting typed text into the password slot. This is a narrow local-validation bypass for the current native-login hitbox regression; the server remains authoritative for accepting or rejecting credentials.
patches.verified: RE-confirmed in FUN_0051a370 case 1: after copying account field 3/0 and password field 3/1, VA 0x0051a672 and 0x0051a67d are the account/password zero-length branches to the same local error, and FUN_0051bc20(param_1,param_2) stores param_1 as the account/global login label and param_2 as the password. Current live native-layout evidence shows WM_CHAR lands in the password slot even when clicking the visible ID field, so this patch NOPs both local empty-field branches and passes the password slot as both FUN_0051bc20 arguments. Server-side auth remains the real gate.

sites.note: login local validation: ignore blank account field while native hitboxes route text into password slot
login local validation: ignore blank password field
login submit: pass password slot as account argument while account field hitbox is unresolved

patches.name: lobby-res
patches.desc: Retarget the lobby's hardcoded 1024x768 to a real 1920x1080 native canvas. FUN_0051a370 pushes 0x400/0x300 to FUN_00401760 (D3D+UI scaler FUN_004ea460) and FUN_004e7570 (window) in 4 sub-states; this patches all 8 same-length push immediates. Pair with lobby-native-layout.json so scene anchors are moved for the wider canvas instead of letterboxing. RE: docs/logh7-graphics-remaster.md.
patches.verified: ENCODED + originalHex-checked against G7MTClient.playable.exe. Live native-1920 probe 2026-06-20 confirmed this removes display stretching; without lobby-native-layout the authored 1024-era UI remains left-heavy.

patches.name: lobby-native-layout-v2
patches.desc: Lobby scene-anchor recenter (FUN_0051c980 anchor table). Replaces uniform-scale lobby-native-layout: instead of multiplying 1024-canvas coords by ~1.875 (which left widgets clustered left-of-center because widget sprite widths do not scale), this TRANSLATES the whole original 1024x768 anchor block to the visual center of the 1920x1080 native canvas: x_new=x_orig+DX (DX=448=(1920-1024)/2), y_new=y_orig+DY (DY=156=(1080-768)/2). Same-length immediate flips only -> render geometry intact, low risk. Pair with lobby-res.json (1024x768->1920x1080 backbuffer). DX/DY are the live micro-tune knobs: nudge DX +/- to balance horizontal, DY +/- for vertical, regenerate. Integer truncation matches legacy cast.
patches.verified: originalHex 16B-guarded against pristine _pristine.exe (2848be76); all 13 immediates byte-verified. Centering geometry requires one live screenshot to confirm/micro-tune DX,DY.

sites.note: main lobby panel anchor x 300 -> 748 (1920-center, DX=448)

patches.name: charsel-recenter
patches.desc: 캐릭터 생성/선택 패널(FUN_0051e580, 진영선택·초상화·이름·능력치 8단계 폼 컨테이너)을 1920x1080에서 시각적 중앙으로 이동. ★로비(lobby-native-layout) 방식과 동일: 패널 컨테이너 앵커 1점만 이동(자식 위젯은 패널-로컬 좌표라 자동 따라옴). 절대 3x 스케일 아님(=640트랩 회피). 패널 크기 711x520(0x2c7 x 0x208)은 불변, 앵커 (300,134)->(604,280)=중앙정렬. same-length 즉치값 교체.
patches.verified: RE-CONFIRMED FUN_0051e580: 앵커는 FUN_00507a50(&local_2c8)에 전달되는 local_2c8=300(0x12c)/local_2c4=134(0x86), foff 0x11e94e/0x11e956. 패널 크기 local_2d8=0x2c7(711)/local_2d4=0x208(520) foff 0x11e928/0x11e930. 자식 위젯 rect는 FUN_00502940가 widget+0x20에 그대로 복사(부모오프셋 미가산)=패널-로컬 좌표 -> 앵커 1점 이동이 전체 패널을 옮김. originalHex는 canon playable 992dc7e2 + pristine 둘 다 BYTE-검증 일치. 중앙=(1920-711)/2=604(정수 trunc), (1080-520)/2=280.

sites.note: panel container anchor X 300 -> 604 (center of 1920: (1920-711)/2). FUN_00507a50 local_2c8.
panel container anchor Y 134 -> 280 (center of 1080: (1080-520)/2). FUN_00507a50 local_2c4.
content panel FUN_0051dc00 anchor X 300->604 (+304). 507a50 setter 직전 확증.
8단계 폼 내용 패널 FUN_0051f8b0 MAIN anchor X 300->604 (+304). 진영/이름/값슬롯 origin.
8단계 폼 내용 패널 FUN_0051f8b0 MAIN anchor Y 134->280 (+146).
FUN_0051f8b0 행 레이아웃 상대베이스 add ecx,0x12c(300)->0x25c(604). 값슬롯 row origin X.
FUN_0051f8b0 행 레이아웃 상대베이스 add eax,0x86(134)->0x118(280). 값슬롯 row origin Y.
FUN_005989f0 step-panel Y 134->242 (+108). PIL측정: 콘텐츠가 프레임중심보다 38px 아래 → 위로 38 보정(280→242) center-to-center.
진영 라디오/엠블렘 패널 (FUN_00595e70) X 300->604 (+304, 프레임과 uniform). over-move 676은 우측 과도라 되돌림 — 정확 센터링은 블록 bbox 라이브 측정 후 결정(center-to-center).
진영 라디오/엠블렘 패널 Y 134->242 (+108). 콘텐츠 위로 38 보정(center-to-center, FUN_005989f0과 동일).

patches.name: charsel-content-inset
patches.desc: Second-stage lobby character-creation content inset. Applies after charsel-recenter and moves only the 8-step creation form content groups right by 116 px, so labels, input boxes, radio rows, and bottom buttons sit inside the native right panel. The main lobby notice panel and session-card list anchors are intentionally unchanged.
patches.verified: Static target from live screenshots lobby-recenter-5aa1-20260628: native right panel visual center is about x=1080, while the creation form content group center is about x=963. Move step-form anchors x=604 -> 720 and the input sub-group x=909 -> 1025. This descriptor drift-checks against the post-charsel-recenter bytes, not the pristine EXE.

patches.name: charsel-content-y-inset
patches.desc: Character-creation content Y inset for the native 1920x1080 lobby. Applies after charsel-recenter and charsel-content-inset, correcting the two remaining stale step-form anchors from Y=242 to the panel-aligned Y=280 so instruction text and form content sit inside the right panel.
patches.verified: Live fc703 screenshots hud-spot-static-fc70-20260629 measured the right panel blue bbox at about y=293..808 while several create-step instruction glyphs rendered around y=276, above the frame. Static RE/decompile confirmed FUN_005989f0 and FUN_00595e70 still carried post-recenter Y=242 bytes, unlike the main panel/container anchors at Y=280. A title-only child rect patch fixed only one transition screen, so the durable fix is to align these stale content anchors with the panel anchor.

sites.note: FUN_005989f0 step-panel anchor Y 242 -> 280 (+38), post-charsel-recenter correction.
FUN_00595e70 faction radio/emblem panel anchor Y 242 -> 280 (+38), post-charsel-recenter correction.
